product.name: Nongshim Instant Cup Noodle - Korean Clay Pot

metaData.Ingredients:
• Noodle (88.1%): Potato Starch (46%), Wheat Flour (22%), Palm Oil (12%), Wheat Gluten, Salt, Emulsifier [Lecithin (E322)], Soybean Oil, Acidity Regulator [Potassium Carbonate (E330)], Water, Thickener [Guar Gum (E412)], Green Tea Flavour Oil
• Soup (10.3%): Salt, Flavour Enhancer [Monosodium L-Glutamate (E621), Disodium 5'-Ribonucleotides (E635)], White Sugar, Soy Sauce Powder, Artificial Beef Flavour, Palm Oil, Radish Powder, Yeast Extract Powder, Garlic Powder, Onion Powder, Black Pepper Powder, Red Pepper Powder, Roasted Sesame, Oleoresin Capsicum Coating Powder, Garlic Flavor Oil
• Flake (1.6%): Dried Chives, Dried Carrot, Dried Onion, Dried Oak Mushroom, Dried Red Pepper
• Allergen advice: Contains wheat, gluten. soybean and sesame
• Manufactured in a facility that also processes fish, egg, milk and shellfish

metaData.Key Information:
• Perfect Korean famous taste
• Great small cup sized noodle that is good for snacking
metaData.Preparation:
Cooking directions:
• For hot water:
1. Open lid halfway and add soup base
2. Pour hot water up to the line inside
3. Close lid for 3 minutes
4. Stir well and serve
• For microwave:
1. Completely remove lid
2. Pour room temperature water up to the line inside
3. Microwave for 3 minutes
4. Stir well and ready to serve
metaData.SAP Product Name: NONGSHIM CUP NOODLES - SPICY MUSHROOM FLAVOR 72G

metaData.Ingredients:
• Noodles: Wheat Flour (Cereal containing Gluten), Palm Oil, Potato Starch, Salt, Acidity Regulator (E501, E500), Vegetable Flavour Sauce (Malt Syrup, Onion, Garlic), Colour (E101(I)), Tea Extract
• Soup Powder: Salt, Flavour Enhancer (E621, E635), Hydrolysed Vegetable Protein (Soya Bean Product), Chilli Powder, Spices, Sugar, Soya Bean Paste Powder (Soya Bean Product), Yeast Extract, Vegetable Oil, Mushroom, Corn Flour, Chilli Extract, Malt Syrup, Maltodextrin, Colour (E150A)
• Vegetables: Dehydrated Chives, Dehydrated Mushroom, Dehydrated Carrot, Dehydrated Red Pepper
metaData.Key Information: Specially mixed flour for premium noodles is used to bring a chewy texture to the noodles.
metaData.Preparation:
1. Boil 550ml (about 2 1/4 cup) of water
2. Add noodles, soup base and vegetable mix
3. Cook for 4 minutes - 5 minutes, stirring occasionally
4. Remove from heat and serve

metaData.Ingredients:

metaData.Key Information: Kimchi Ramyun provides the convenience of the traiditional taste of kimchi in instant form, allowing its consumers to experience the taste of kimchi, a favourite food amongst Koreans.
metaData.Preparation:
1. Add noodles, flakes and soup base to 500ml of boiling water
2. Cook for 3 minutes
3. Stir well and serve

product.name: Ottogi Korean Instant Noodle - Jin Ramen (Spicy)

offers.description: Buy 1 Ottogi Korean Instant Noodle - Jin Ramen (Spicy) @ $5.50

metaData.Ingredients:
• Noodles: Wheat Flour (Cereal containing Gluten), Palm Oil, Starch, Salt, Acidity Regulator (Potassium Carbonate)
• Soup Powder: Salt, Flavour (Kimchi), Flavour Enhancer (Monosodium Glutamate), Spices
• Vegetables: Dehydrated Kimchi, Dehydrated Chinese Cabbage, Dehydrated Chives

• Noodle Cake: Wheat Flour, Palm Oil, Salt, Potassium Chloride, Guar Gum, Sodium Tripolyphosphate, Potassium Carbonate, Sodium Carbonate
• Soup Mix: Salt, Monosodium Glutamate, Palm Oil, Starch, Potassium Chloride, Sugar, Chilli, Wheat Flour, Yeast, Garlic, Maltodextrin, Coriander, Flavourings (contain soya), Sodium Inosinate and Sodium Guanylate, Onion, Cumin, Citric Acid, Aniseed, Tumeric, Caramel, Ginger, Fenugreek, Canola Oil, Clove, Cardamom, Nutmeg, Paprika Guar Gum, Anti-caking Agent (E551).
• May contain: Crustaceans, Fish, Milk, Celery and Mustard
metaData.Key Information: Made with 11 secret spices infused with real chillies that are slow cooked to perfection, it is no surprise why this is every Singaporeans’ favourite. Serve with fresh vegetables for a delicious and more balanced meal for the whole family.
metaData.Preparation:
Directions:
• For Soup
1. Bring 2 cups of water (350ml) to boil
2. Add in noodle cake, soup mix and protein & vegetables of your choice
3. Cook for 2 minutes and enjoy!
• For Dry
1. Cook noodle cake for 1 minute and drain off the water
2. Fry noodles with soup mix and protein & vegetables of your choice
3. Enjoy!

product.description: Springy noodles served in the comforting flavour of chicken broth, Koka signature chicken noodles is a timeless classic with big on taste.

metaData.Ingredients:
• Noodles: Wheat Flour (Cereal containing Gluten), Palm Oil, Starch, Salt, Acidity Regulator (Potassium Carbonate)

• Noodle Cake: Wheat Flour, Palm Oil, Salt, Potassium Chloride, Guar Gum, Sodium Tripolyphosphate, Potassium Carbonate and Sodium Carbonate
• Soup Mix: Salt, Monosodium Glutamate, Sugar, Corn Starch, Flavourings (contains Milk), Chicken Fat and Meat, Soya Sauce (contains Wheat), Palm Oil, Leek, Onion, Garlic, Spices (contains Celery), Sodium Inosinate and Sodium Guanylate and Citric Acid

metaData.Key Information: Made with real chicken essence and a blend of aromatic herbs and spices, this truly is comfort food at its finest. Serve with fresh vegetables for a delicious and more balanced meal for the whole family.
metaData.Preparation:
Directions:
1. Empty noodles and soup mix into 360ml of boiling water
2. Simmer gently for 2 minutes
3. Serve immediately

metaData.Key Information: Bound to leave you wanting more of its spice is the highly raved Samyang Hot Chicken Instant Ramen! The noodles are classic Korean Ramen made out of wheat flour, thicker and chewier than your usual instant noodles. Be prepared for the tingling sensation on your taste buds from this hot ramen!
metaData.Preparation:
Cooking instructions:
1. Put noodles into 600ml boiling water and cook for 5 minutes
2. Remove water from noodles, leave about 8 spoons of water and pour liquid soup into noodles and stir fry for 30 seconds
3. Put flakes and stir well before serving
metaData.Storage Information:
• Store in cool and dry place
• Avoid direct sunlight
